mapper.update: UPDATE product p JOIN ( SELECT product_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY product_id DESC) AS rn FROM product WHERE product_id <= 51 ) ranked ON p.product_id = ranked.product_id SET p.insert_dt = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL (ranked.rn - 1) MINUTE);
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_type ORDER BY insert_dt DESC) AS rn FROM product WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ) ranked WHERE rn <= 3
